metaData.Key Information:
The unmistakable full-flavour of Nescafe Classic is what makes our signature coffee so loved all over the world. Savour the wonderfully rich and refreshing aroma of this medium-dark roast. Start a day right with the first sips of this classic, let the intense taste of Nescafe Classic awaken the mind and body to new opportunities as the rich aroma of this distinctive blend unfolds. Blended quality arabica and robusta beans and then roast them to medium-dark deliciousness to deliver the pleasurable experience.
• Net weight: 200g
metaData.Preparation: 1 teaspoon of Nescafe Instant Coffee with 150g of water and add creamer, skimmed milk or sugar if desired
metaData.SAP Product Name: NESCAFE CLASSIC INSTANT COFFEE + ARABICA BEAN 200G
metaData.Storage Information: After opening, firmly close back the lid and store in a cool, dry place

Nescafe Original Zero Sugar 2in1

metaData.Ingredients: Soluble Coffee with Finely Ground Roasted Coffee
metaData.Key Information: With Nescafe Gold, only world-class coffee beans are selected and golden roasted to create this sophisticated coffee.
metaData.Preparation:
1. Prepare 1 teaspoon of Nescafe Gold into your mug
2. Pour in 150 ml of hot water and stir thoroughly
3. Customize your cup to your favorite taste (eg. Milk, Creamer, Sugar)
metaData.Storage Information: After opening, firmly replace the lid and store in a cool, dry place

metaData.Ingredients:
Sugar, Creamer [Glucose Syrup, Hydrogenated Palm Kernel Oil, Stabilizers (E340ii, E451i, E452i, E331iii), Sodium Caseinate (Milk Protein), Emulsifiers, Anticaking Agent (E551), Salt, Flavourings], Instant Coffee, Skimmed Milk Powder (Cow's Milk), Resistant Dextrin, Brown Sugar, Salt, Flavourings
• Allergen information: Contains milk
metaData.Key Information: Only the finest beans are selected for every great tasting cup of Nescafe Original. Coupled with a signature coffee aroma, enjoy a perfectly balanced cup of Nescafe Original 3in1, now with brown sugar.
metaData.Preparation: Add 180ml of hot water and give it a good stir

product.description: Make café quality iced coffee easy at home with new NESCAFE® Espresso Concentrate Sweet Vanilla! Made with the finest roasted Arabica coffee beans lightly sweetened with a hint of vanilla, concentrated to capture that rich, smooth coffee taste. Pour it over ice and milk to suit your taste for that cafe-style Iced Latte!

metaData.Ingredients: Water, Soluble Coffee (8.3%), Acidity Regulator (Sodium Bicarbonate).
metaData.Key Information: Love café-style iced coffees? Mix delicious iced coffee at home with new NESCAFÉ Espresso Concentrate. Unleash your inner barista with this rich, bold coffee base and make it just the way you like it.
metaData.Preparation: Pour 250ml (1 cup) of Cold Milk / Water into a glass. Shake bottle well, add 2-3 tbsp (50ml) of Concentrate to the glass. Stir, add ice and enjoy.
metaData.Storage Information: Store Cool and Dry. Once opened, store refrigerated and use within 14 days.
